news.t: Macquarie Asset Management Launches Focused International Core Equity ETF

holdings.infoBox: EXUS is an equity ETF with a total of 60 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 8.57%, SK hynix at 5.73%, ASML Holding at 4.44%, ING Groep at 3.81%, and Banco Bilbao Vizcaya Argentaria at 3.34%.

overview.description: The Nomura ETF Trust Nomura Focused International Core ETF (EXUS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund employs a bottom-up fundamental analysis to broadly invest in large-cap equity securities. The fund selects stocks and depositary receipts from both developed and emerging market countries, excluding the United States. EXUS was launched on Jun 17, 2025 and is issued by Nomura.

data.title: Macquarie Asset Management Launches Focused International Core Equity ETF
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Today, Macquarie Asset Management expanded its active exchange-traded fund (ETF) platform with the launch of Macquarie Focused International Core Equity ETF (EXUS). Managed ...
